heading: Claims of United States; priority
label: 617p Claims of United States; priority
text: Except as provided in title 11, claims of the United States arising out of any contract authorized by this subchapter shall have priority over all others, secured or unsecured.
notes: Amendments1978— inserted introductory phrase “Except as provided in title 11”.Pub. L. 95–598

Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as an Effective Dates note preceding , Bankruptcy.Pub. L. 95–598section 402(a) of Pub. L. 95–598section 101 of Title 11Oct. 1, 1979
